message:
bd-39m5: port matmul operator family across runtime stack

Implement a substantive porting slice for matrix multiplication end-to-end:

- ft-kernel-cpu
  - Add  with dtype/device/layout validation
  - Enforce 2D rank + inner-dimension compatibility
  - Add correctness and fail-closed tests

- ft-dispatch
  - Extend  with
  - Route tensor dispatch to matmul kernels for CPU/AutogradCPU
  - Keep scalar matmul fail-closed with explicit dispatch-key incompatibility errors
  - Add dispatch and schema-registry tests for matmul

- ft-autograd
  - Add tensor matmul op wiring in
  - Add output-shape inference for matmul
  - Implement deterministic backward gradients:
    - dA = dOut @ B^T
    - dB = A^T @ dOut
  - Extend graph traversal/dependency scheduling to include matmul nodes
  - Add autograd matmul forward/backward test

- ft-api
  - Expose  on
  - Add API-level gradient/evidence test

- ft-conformance
  - Add  op parsing in tensor-binary harness
  - Add  fixture with forward + gradient expectations

Validation (offloaded via rch):
- cargo fmt --check
- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- targeted tests for kernel/dispatch/autograd/api and tensor-binary conformance
